title.source: Google Analytics, Siteimprove and Facebook Pixel
title.target: Google Analytics, Siteimprove and Facebook Pixel

body:0001.source: What are tracking integrations and which do we support?
body:0001.target: What are tracking integrations and which do we support?

body:0002.source: You can integrate your platform with external analytics tools such as Google Analytics (UA and GA4), Facebook Pixel, or Siteimprove by submitting the correct tracking code.
body:0002.target: You can integrate your platform with external analytics tools such as Google Analytics (UA and GA4), Facebook Pixel, or Siteimprove by submitting the correct tracking code.

body:0005.source: Connect your platform with external dashboards
body:0005.target: Connect your platform with external dashboards

body:0008.source: Google Analytics (UA or GA4 Tracking ID)
body:0008.target: Google Analytics (UA or GA4 Tracking ID)

body:0012.source: How to add Google Analytics to your platform?
body:0012.target: How to add Google Analytics to your platform?

body:0013.source: Locate your Google Tracking ID (either UA-code or GA4-code).
body:0013.target: Locate your Google Tracking ID (either UA-code or GA4-code).

body:0014.source: Send it to us at via the chat bubble
body:0014.target: Send it to us at via the chat bubble

body:0015.source: We’ll implement the code on your platform and confirm once active.
body:0015.target: We’ll implement the code on your platform and confirm once active.

body:0016.source: You can also send us a Google Tag Manager HTML snippet if you prefer managing tags through GTM.
body:0016.target: You can also send us a Google Tag Manager HTML snippet if you prefer managing tags through GTM.

body:0017.source: Need help? Where to find your Google Tracking ID
body:0017.target: Need help? Where to find your Google Tracking ID

body:0018.source: How to add siteimprove to your platform?
body:0018.target: How to add siteimprove to your platform?

body:0019.source: Get your Siteimprove HTML tag from your Siteimprove admin.
body:0019.target: Get your Siteimprove HTML tag from your Siteimprove admin.

body:0020.source: Email the full HTML tag to support via the chat bubble
body:0020.target: Email the full HTML tag to support via the chat bubble

body:0021.source: We’ll embed it on your platform and confirm setup.
body:0021.target: We’ll embed it on your platform and confirm setup.

body:0022.source: How to add facebook pixel to your platform?
body:0022.target: How to add facebook pixel to your platform?

body:0023.source: Go to Events Manager in your Facebook Business account.
body:0023.target: Go to Events Manager in your Facebook Business account.

body:0024.source: Select your pixel, then click Set Up > Install Pixel.
body:0024.target: Select your pixel, then click Set Up > Install Pixel.

body:0025.source: Choose Manually add pixel code to website.
body:0025.target: Choose Manually add pixel code to website.

body:0026.source: Copy the entire main Pixel code.
body:0026.target: Copy the entire main Pixel code.

body:0027.source: Send the full HTML code to support via the chat bubble.
body:0027.target: Send the full HTML code to support via the chat bubble.

body:0028.source: Once installed, Facebook will begin tracking events on your platform.
body:0028.target: Once installed, Facebook will begin tracking events on your platform.

body:0029.source: Learn more: Where to find your Facebook Pixel code
body:0029.target: Learn more: Where to find your Facebook Pixel code

body:0030.source: Who installs the tracking codes for your platform?
body:0030.target: Who installs the tracking codes for your platform?

body:0031.source: Our team handles the integration of all tracking codes for you.
body:0031.target: Our team handles the integration of all tracking codes for you.

body:0034.source: A custom HTML snippet (for Siteimprove, GTM, Facebook Pixel, etc.)
body:0034.target: A custom HTML snippet (for Siteimprove, GTM, Facebook Pixel, etc.)

body:0035.source: to support via the chat bubble and we’ll take care of the rest.
body:0035.target: to support via the chat bubble and we’ll take care of the rest.

body:0036.source: No action is required on your end beyond sharing the correct code.
body:0036.target: No action is required on your end beyond sharing the correct code.
